name: N.X.P.D. (Police)
mission: To enforce the law, maintain order, and protect the citizens of Nexus City through unwavering dedication and tactical superiority.
vision: A self-sustaining judicial ecosystem where crime is met with calculated, overwhelming force, and justice is swiftly delivered.

rules.title: Basic Protocol
points: Always respect the chain of command.
Lethal force is authorized only when civilian lives are in imminent danger.
Bodycams must remain active during all active pursuits and engagements.

rules.title: Advanced Protocol
points: High-speed pursuits require clear communication and must not endanger populated zones.
All seized narcotics and weapons must be rigorously documented in the evidence locker.
Interrogations require at least two officers present at all times.

roles.name: Chief of Police
roles.desc: Executive Oversight — Lead director of the NXPD responsible for departmental strategy and legal relations.

roles.name: S.W.A.T. Operator
roles.desc: Specialized Units — Tactical expert trained for hostage rescue and high-risk syndicate engagements.

roles.name: Detective
roles.desc: Investigative Lead — Senior investigator specializing in complex crime strings and undercover tracking.

roles.name: Patrol Officer
roles.desc: Uniformed Division — The backbone of city law enforcement, managing first-response and public safety.
